scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../social-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../../client && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "cd services/auth-service && npm start" "cd services/user-service && npm start" "cd services/social-service && npm start" "cd services/payment-service && npm start" "cd services/api-gateway && npm start" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "AUTH,USER,SOCIAL,PAYMENT,GATEWAY,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,red,magenta,cyan" "cd services/auth-service && npm run dev" "cd services/user-service && npm run dev" "cd services/social-service && npm run dev" "cd services/payment-service && npm run dev" "cd services/api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
